title: Jake Barber’s experience with NHI at his home witnessed by both his family and neighbors. #ufo
summary: Jake Barber describes UAP phenomena that follows him home, including a recurring blue craft with wing-like features that his family and neighbors have witnessed appearing over his house before rapidly departing into space.

acronyms.definition: Term used to describe unidentified objects or phenomena in the sky
Term referring to intelligence of non-human origin

key_claims.claim: UAP phenomena has followed Jake Barber home and is witnessed by his family
A blue UAP called 'the angel' with wing-like features repeatedly materializes over his house
The UAP is witnessed by neighbors as well as family members
The UAP shoots into outer space after appearing
